name: bold
description: Vibrant market scene energy with colorful ingredients piled high and wok fire blazing. This mood captures the raw, exciting chaos of Malaysian food culture — hawker stalls, pasar malam, and the sizzle of street cooking.

style.lighting: high contrast natural market light | wok fire glow | neon signage accents
style.color_grade: saturated warm tones | deep reds and golds | punchy contrast
style.camera: dynamic handheld | close-up sizzle shots | wide establishing market shot
style.composition: ingredient hero stacks | action cooking moments | crowded market energy
style.props: wok, fresh chili piles, turmeric roots, market baskets, hawker stall setup, gas flame

copy_tone: Punchy and confident, with exclamation-worthy flavor descriptions. Uses power words — sizzling, bursting, bold. Makes you want to grab a plate immediately.

music.mood: upbeat percussion, world music fusion, energetic

example_prompt_fragment: A vibrant Malaysian market stall scene, piles of bright red chilies and golden turmeric in the foreground, wok flames leaping high in the background, a hawker cooking with confident motion, colorful signage, saturated warm tones, dynamic handheld camera feel, editorial lifestyle food photography
